features.name: Document Import
features.description: Allow users to import PDF and TXT documents from local filesystem
acceptance_criteria: User can select PDF or TXT files via file dialog
Selected files are copied to project data directory

features.name: Document Chunking
features.description: Split imported documents into ~500 character chunks with metadata
acceptance_criteria: Documents split into chunks of approximately 500 characters
Each chunk has metadata: word count, line count, paragraph count
